paragraphs.source: In the case of Nvidia’s X800-Q3450 CPO switch, more than 1,000 optical fibers emerge from the OEs, so a shuffle box is needed to organize them and route them to their destinations. Traditionally, this shuffle box alignment process was done manually, with technicians physically arranging the fibers. However, some leading companies have developed automated machines capable of performing the alignment with higher accuracy and efficiency.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: In the case of Nvidia’s X800-Q3450 CPO switch, more than 1,000 optical fibers emerge from the OEs, so a shuffle box is needed to organize them and route them to their destinations. Traditionally, this shuffle box alignment process was done manually, with technicians physically arranging the fibers. However, some leading companies have developed automated machines capable of performing the alignment with higher accuracy and efficiency.

Traditionally, this shuffle box alignment process was done manually, with technicians physically arranging the fibers. However, some leading companies have developed automated machines capable of performing the alignment with higher accuracy and efficiency.

pro.text: 以英伟达X800-Q3450共封装光学（CPO）交换机为例，从光引擎（OE）中会引出超过1000根光纤，因此需要使用光纤洗牌盒（shuffle box）来整理并将它们路由到各自目的地。不过，部分领先企业已开发出自动化对准设备，能够以更高精度和效率完成这一工作。

paragraphs.source: The price of a shuffle box is typically linked to the number of fibers it manages. For example, T&S Communications sells a 48-fiber shuffle box for ~$150, a 300-fiber version for ~$1,000, and a 500-fiber model for ~$1,600. For the X800-Q3450 with thousands of fibers, the shuffle box would cost Nvidia more than $3,000 to procure. The primary BOM components in a shuffle box include MT ferrules and fibers.

For the X800-Q3450 with thousands of fibers, the shuffle box would cost Nvidia more than $3,000 to procure. The primary BOM components in a shuffle box include MT ferrules and fibers.

For the X800-Q3450 with thousands of fibers, the shuffle box would cost Nvidia more than $3,000 to procure. The primary BOM components in a shuffle box include MT ferrules and fibers.

pro.text: 光纤洗牌盒的价格通常与其管理的光纤数量直接挂钩。例如，T&S通讯销售的48芯洗牌盒约为150美元，300芯版本约为1000美元，500芯型号约为1600美元。对于拥有数千根光纤的X800-Q3450而言，英伟达采购该洗牌盒的成本将超过3000美元。洗牌盒的主要BOM组件包括MT插芯和光纤。

paragraphs.source: T&S Communications (300570.SH) is a leading player in the shuffle box industry. The company has developed automated machines to align fibers within shuffle boxes. The technologies are patented, and it may take time and additional costs for competitors to bypass them. T&S’s major customer is Corning, and the two companies often work in tandem to serve clients. For instance, Corning helps clients (Nvidia, Broadcom, etc.) to design the fiber networks for their CPO solutions, and subcontract the shuffle box part to T&S.

The technologies are patented, and it may take time and additional costs for competitors to bypass them. T&S’s major customer is Corning, and the two companies often work in tandem to serve clients. For instance, Corning helps clients (Nvidia, Broadcom, etc.) to design the fiber networks for their CPO solutions, and subcontract the shuffle box part to T&S.

For instance, Corning helps clients (Nvidia, Broadcom, etc.) to design the fiber networks for their CPO solutions, and subcontract the shuffle box part to T&S.

pro.text: T&S通讯（300570.SH）是光纤洗牌盒领域的主要玩家。该公司开发了自动化设备，可精准对准洗牌盒内光纤。相关技术均已获得专利保护，竞争对手若想绕开这些专利，势必耗费额外时间和成本。T&S的主要客户是康宁，两家公司经常联手为客户提供服务。例如，康宁帮助客户（英伟达、博通等）为其共封装光学（CPO）解决方案设计光纤网络，并将洗牌盒部分转包给T&S。

paragraphs.source: Molex is another notable player and also entered the market quite early. However, due to lower manufacturing efficiency, its product price is usually ~20% higher than T&S’s.

pro.text: Molex也是较早入场的厂商之一，不过由于制造效率较低，其产品价格通常比T&S高出约20%。
